title: Spiced Cauli, Chicken & Couscous Traybake
summary: All the North African flavours you love in one golden traybake. Juicy spiced chicken, roasted cauliflower, sweet apricots and fluffy couscous – weeknight dinner, sorted.

ingredients.label: 4 Large Chicken Thighs, bone in, skin on
ingredients.name: Bone-In Skin-On Chicken Thigh

ingredients.label: 4 Large Chicken Thighs, bone in, skin on
ingredients.name: Chicken

ingredients.label: 2 Tsp Moroccan Spice Blend or Chicken Seasoning
ingredients.name: Moroccan Seasoning

method.description: Heat the oven to 220°C. Pat the chicken thighs dry with kitchen paper. Cut the cauliflower into 6 wedges, removing the thick green leaves but keeping the core and light green leaves  intact.

Add the chicken thighs and cauliflower onto to a large roasting tray. Sprinkle over the Moroccan seasoning, salt and pepper, then drizzle everything with the olive oil. Rub it all together so it’s evenly coated.
Slide into the oven and roast for 30 mins, or until the chicken skin is golden and crisp and the juices run clear.
Meanwhile, pick the coriander leaves and roughly chop the dried apricots.

Once the chicken is cooked, transfer it to a plate to rest. Tip the couscous, apricots and half the coriander into the tray. Pour over the chicken stock and stir gently to soak up all the roasting juices and flavour.
Return the tray to the oven for 3 mins while the chicken rests.
To serve, fluff the couscous, return the chicken on top, then scatter over the toasted almonds and remaining coriander.

chefs.name: Anna Helm Baxter
chefs.summary: Anna Helm Baxter is a cookbook author, food stylist, and food producer at Mob. Having spent most of her life in the US, she loves potlucks, tailgates, and a good Thanksgiving spread. As a working mum of three, she gets the dinner struggle, which is why she’s all about recipes that are joyful, healthy, and totally doable. And if all else fails she always has cookies stashed in the freezer.
